title: Feed v0.2.1
content:
Feed moved from a long continuous archive into a more usable editorial tool and weekly log surface. This pass focused on navigation, editing, timing clarity, and better alignment with the JeffersonWM homepage rhythm.

What changed:

  • Grouped the timeline by calendar week with week numbers and prev/next week navigation, then added a dedicated Manual view beside Full Feed and Changelog.
  • Added in-page editing and deletion for manual entries and changelog/release entries, while keeping GitHub-imported items read-only.
  • Restored explicit U.S. Pacific timestamps on the feed and moved Editor Login down beside Sync GitHub so the header stays quieter.
  • Aligned Feed spacing more closely with JeffersonWM, and adjusted the homepage widget to sit on the same 102px top rhythm with cleaner stacked city, time, date, event, and weather lines.

Next up is continued visual work: spacing, hierarchy, and cross-site alignment are in a better place, but we are still shaping the final visual language.
